description: Missing required `name` field in command frontmatter; command registration may fall back to filename or fail entirely.
suggested_fix: Add `name: brainstorm` to the YAML frontmatter block.

description: Missing required `name` field in command frontmatter; command registration may fall back to filename or fail entirely.
suggested_fix: Add `name: write-plan` to the YAML frontmatter block.

description: Missing required `name` field in command frontmatter; command registration may fall back to filename or fail entirely.
suggested_fix: Add `name: execute-plan` to the YAML frontmatter block.

description: No explicit output format section; output structure is described only in vague prose ('structured, actionable, and focused') without a concrete template.
suggested_fix: Add an ## Output Format section with a concrete template showing how Critical/Important/Suggestion issues should be laid out.

description: Vague quantifier 'proper' in 'proper error handling, type safety, and defensive programming' — does not specify what proper means in this context.
suggested_fix: Replace 'proper' with specific criteria, e.g. 'error handling that covers all exception paths'.

description: Vague quantifier 'proper' in 'proper separation of concerns and loose coupling'.
suggested_fix: Replace 'proper' with a concrete criterion such as 'SOLID-compliant separation of concerns'.

description: Vague quantifier 'appropriate' in 'code includes appropriate comments and documentation'.
suggested_fix: Replace 'appropriate' with a specific standard, e.g. 'public-API-level JSDoc on all exported functions'.

description: Vague quantifier 'appropriately-scoped' — leaves scope judgement undefined for the agent.
suggested_fix: Define scope threshold explicitly, e.g. 'fits within a single implementation plan (under 5 tasks)'.

description: The `matcher` field on a SessionStart hook entry is non-standard; Claude Code matchers apply to PostToolUse tool names only. This field is likely silently ignored, making the hook always fire. hooks-cursor.json correctly omits the matcher.
suggested_fix: Remove the `matcher` field from the SessionStart hook, or document the intended platform that supports this field.

description: Deprecated command stub has no allowed-tools declaration.
fp_reason: The command contains no tool invocations; it only emits a text message telling the user to switch skills. allowed-tools is irrelevant for a pure-text redirect stub.
rule_gap: The missing-allowed-tools rule should be suppressed or reduced for commands whose body contains no tool calls.
suggested_fix: Either add `allowed-tools: []` explicitly, or suppress via rule override in nlpm.local.md.

description: Deprecated command stub has no empty input handling. The command always produces the same redirect message regardless of input.
fp_reason: A deprecation stub whose only behavior is to emit a fixed redirect message requires no input-branch logic — there is nothing to handle.
rule_gap: The no-empty-input-handling rule should not penalise commands whose body is a single unconditional message.
suggested_fix: No change needed for a pure redirect stub.

description: Deprecated command stub has no empty input handling.
fp_reason: Single unconditional redirect message; empty input handling inapplicable.
rule_gap: The no-empty-input-handling rule should not penalise commands whose body is a single unconditional message.
